name: Chip Poole
focus: Long-form Myrdae campaigns and classic table adventure.
description: Chip is one of the main active DMs for the table, currently carrying multiple Myrdae campaigns and several older arcs from the archive.

name: Sean Poole
focus: High-stakes active campaigns with sharp danger and momentum.
description: Sean currently runs two active campaigns on the reference site, with one completed campaign in the older archive.

name: Lesley Poole
focus: Dungeon-forward play, society stories, and completed table arcs.
description: Lesley runs an active Monday campaign and has several completed campaigns listed in the previous-campaign archive.

name: Michael Hewson
focus: Arcane mysteries, covert operations, and strange threats.
description: Michael currently hosts two active campaigns and has a Middle Earth campaign listed in the archive.

name: Larry McHale
focus: Archived campaign work and portal stewardship.
description: Larry is represented in the previous-campaign archive and helps steer this portal toward the shared table resources.

name: Chris Glynn
description: Chris has completed campaign history on the reference site, including major D&D adventure paths from the archive.
